title: Matrix / FPU
desc: Negative-control FPU power probe: spams MVMUL into the T0/UNPACK instruction FIFO from BRISC. WEDGES by design — MVMUL belongs on T1/MATH and stalls on SrcA/B dvalid with no producer/consumer thread; cannot be fixed in place (instruction-FIFO topology — see matrix.c). For real FPU/matmul work use the TRISC LLK lane: llk/matmul_perf + math_matmul_perf.
